home.label: Made for Meaningful Moments
home.headline: Send flowers
home.subCopy: A digital bouquet with your words, delivered in seconds — for family, friends, or anyone you care about.
md.letterMessage: Thank you for your endless love, your warm hugs, and for always believing in me.
home.step1Desc: Choose stems and arrange them into a bouquet they'll love.
home.step2Desc: Add a personal note — or pick from our curated message ideas.
home.step3Desc: Get a unique link. Send over WhatsApp in seconds.
home.darkHeadline: They deserve more than a text.
home.darkBody: Make someone in your life feel truly seen. A bouquet and your words — a gift they'll screenshot and save.

create.wdNote_HappyWomen: Happy Women's Day to the strongest woman I know. Thank you for everything you do, quietly and selflessly.
create.wdNote_Tothewoman: To the woman who taught me what love really looks like... wishing you a day as beautiful as you.
create.wdNote_Youcarryso: You carry so much. Today, let someone carry the flowers for you. Happy Women's Day!
create.wdNote_Dearfriend: Dear friend, the world is brighter because you're in it. Happy March 8th!
create.wdNote_Momeveryda: Mom, every day I'm grateful you're mine. Today the whole world celebrates women like you.
create.wdNote_Tomysister: To my sister: fierce, funny, and my forever person. Happy Women's Day!
create.noteIdea_Imaynotbet: I may not be there today, but this bouquet carries my warmest hug.
create.noteIdea_Thankyoufo: Thank you for being the calm in my noisy days. You mean more than words can hold.
create.noteIdea_Isawthesef: I saw these flowers and thought of your smile. Hope they brighten your day.
create.noteIdea_Foreveryti: For every time you stood by me quietly, this is a small way to say I noticed.
create.noteIdea_Distanceis: Distance is hard, but loving you is easy. This is a little piece of my heart for you.
create.noteIdea_Justbecaus: Just because. No reasons needed when someone is this special.
create.noteIdea_Youdeserve: You deserve flowers on ordinary days too — not just the ones worth celebrating.
create.noteIdea_IfIcouldI: If I could, I'd fill every room you walk into with flowers exactly like these.
create.noteIdea_Sendingthi: Sending this because you crossed my mind, and that's reason enough.
create.noteIdea_Forthepers: For the person who never asks for anything — here's something just for you.
md.letterMessage:
Thank you for your endless love, your warm hugs, and for always believing in me.
You are my sunshine. ☀️
md.shareText: Happy Mother's Day! 💐 Open this card for a surprise ✨
